title: Living Fog

moves.title: Bloat
effects: Summon 1 Gas Bomb (increases each use, max 5)

move_pattern: Starts with Advanced Gas → Bloat → Super Gas Blast → Bloat → Super Gas Blast → (Bloat/Super Gas Blast alternate).
notes: Bloat summons Gas Bomb minions into available enemy slots. The number of Gas Bombs summoned starts at 1 and increases by 1 each time Bloat is used, capping at 5. Gas Bombs use a death-blow Explode move (9 damage) and die afterward.
